text:
North Holland, province of the Netherlands, also known as NH, Noord-Holland. Attributes include: 
- located in or next to body of water: "North Sea (direction relative to location: west)",
 "Wadden Sea (direction relative to location: north)",
 "IJsselmeer (direction relative to location: northeast)",
 "Markermeer (direction relative to location: east)"
- number of viewers/listeners: "+919971 (point in time: 24 Nov 2025)"
